title: How can I sum up work hours for tasks?
excerpt:
Hi 
I have a task board that has a “start” and “end” columns both “date” and “duration” (“hours”). the info comes from a zapier integration with toggl. 
any ideas on ho to get a sum of the total hours spent?

posts.author: galefrati (Gal Efrati)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I have a task board that has a “start” and “end” columns both “date” and “duration” (“hours”). the info comes from a zapier integration with toggl.
any ideas on ho to get a sum of the total hours spent?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @galefrati - easiest way would be through a dashboard, utilizing a Numbers or Chart widget depending on your needs. Also, the board will have a total at the bottom.

Thanks
Mark
